languageStrings.LBL_MAPPING_INSTRUCTIONS: Map incoming columns to module fields and configure defaults.
languageStrings.LBL_DEFAULT_VALUE_INFO: You can set a default value per field when source data is empty.
languageStrings.LBL_START_IMPORT_SOON: Run staging to validate data before the final import.
languageStrings.LBL_STAGE_QUEUED: Staging queued as job #%s. The background worker will process it soon.
languageStrings.LBL_RETRY_INFO: Edit the highlighted values and save changes to mark rows for another attempt.
languageStrings.LBL_STEP4_RETRY_DESC: If staging detected errors, you can correct them before starting the final import.
languageStrings.LBL_RETRY_ALERT: Detected failed records (%s/%s). Fix them before continuing.
languageStrings.LBL_IMPORT_MODE_HINT: Use inline for small batches, queue for larger workloads.
languageStrings.LBL_IMPORT_NO_READY_ROWS: No records ready for import – prepare data again.
languageStrings.LBL_IMPORT_RESULT_MESSAGE: Import completed. Created: %s, updated: %s, skipped: %s, errors: %s.
languageStrings.LBL_STAGE_MODE_INFO: Choose how to prepare this batch:
languageStrings.LBL_STAGE_MODE_HINT: Run immediately for tiny files or send it to the queue for cron processing.

jsLanguageStrings.JS_MAPPING_REQUIRED: Map at least one destination field.
jsLanguageStrings.JS_DUPLICATE_FIELD_MAPPING: Field has been assigned more than once: %s
jsLanguageStrings.JS_BATCH_NOT_READY: Batch is not prepared. Generate preview first.
jsLanguageStrings.JS_NO_HEADERS_AVAILABLE: File does not contain header row – map fields manually.
jsLanguageStrings.JS_NO_FIELDS_AVAILABLE: No module fields available for mapping.
jsLanguageStrings.JS_COLUMN_OR_DEFAULT_REQUIRED: Select a source column or set a default value for field %s.
